examples.title: Pseudocode: RGB to HSI Conversion
examples.description: Conversion from RGB to HSI color model
examples.code:
ALGORITHM RGBtoHSI
INPUT: R, G, B (0-255)
OUTPUT: H, S, I (HSI values)

BEGIN
 I = (R + G + B) / 3
 S = 1 - min(R, G, B) / I
 IF B <= G THEN
 H = arccos(((R-G)+(R-B)) / (2*sqrt((R-G)^2 + (R-B)*(G-B))))
 ELSE
 H = 360 - arccos(((R-G)+(R-B)) / (2*sqrt((R-G)^2 + (R-B)*(G-B))))
 END IF
 RETURN H, S, I
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the conversion from RGB to HSI color model. It calculates the intensity (I), saturation (S), and hue (H) values based on the input RGB values.

examples.title: Python: RGB to HSI Conversion
examples.description: Conversion from RGB to HSI color model using Python
examples.code:
import math

def rgb_to_hsi(r, g, b):
 i = (r + g + b) / 3
 s = 1 - min(r, g, b) / i
 if b <= g:
 h = math.acos(((r-g)+(r-b)) / (2*math.sqrt((r-g)**2 + (r-b)*(g-b))))
 else:
 h = 360 - math.acos(((r-g)+(r-b)) / (2*math.sqrt((r-g)**2 + (r-b)*(g-b))))
 return h, s, i

# Test the function
r, g, b = 255, 0, 0 # Red color
h, s, i = rgb_to_hsi(r, g, b)
print(f"Hue: {h:.2f}, Saturation: {s:.2f}, Intensity: {i:.2f}")
examples.explanation: This Python code implements the RGB to HSI conversion using the same formula as the pseudocode. It defines a function `rgb_to_hsi` that takes RGB values as input and returns the corresponding HSI values.

examples.title: C: RGB to HSI Conversion
examples.description: Conversion from RGB to HSI color model using C
examples.explanation: This C code implements the RGB to HSI conversion using the same formula as the pseudocode. It defines a function `rgb_to_hsi` that takes RGB values as input and returns the corresponding HSI values through pointers.
